entry.title: Re: PO Vendor Name in GRPO Query
entry.content:
Hi,

The field can be added by joining the row table of the GRPO row table i.e PDN1 to the PO header table i.e OPOR checking the BaseType and the BaseEntry.

However, do we have any circumstance or Business Scenario where a PO has a different Vendor Name to the GRPO Vendor Name where they are based on each other? I am not sure. 

If they are based, then Vendor Name in PO = Vendor Name in GRPO.

If they are different, then there would be no link in PO and the GRPO.

If PO and GRPO have same vendor, then you can use the name field from GRPO. Not sure (again based on business process)

regards,

Jitin

thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Tools for Eclipse 2024-06 or 2024-09
entry.content:

I’ve a Problem with the HANA Tools for the Eclipse Version 2024-06.

Every Time I want to open a Content Object other than a Calculation View I‘m getting a Error.

It states that the Method void <init> is Missing in com.sap.rnd.ui.syntaxcoloring.RndPresentationReconcilerUsingTextChangeListener.

Is there something we can do to solve this Problem?

Greetings,

Ben

entry.title: Transport request without direct connection from Non-prod to Prod environment
entry.content:
Currently, we are using STMS to transport TRs from Non-Prod to Prod environment. There's an IT security requirement that discourage direct connection establish from non-prod environment to prod environment, vice versa.

How can we use STMS without establishing direct connections between non-production and production system? What is the best strategy that ensures security and compliance with the restriction of direct communication between these environments.

How can we create BTP destination for retrieval API? I tried using OauthClientCredential with mTLS but it is not working and giving error as "Failure reason: "Could not check at the moment. Please try again later"

Kindly help regarding this.

regards,

Can anyone guide me please

entry.title: Re: Unable to register SAP Desktop Agent 3
entry.content:
Hello @NKat ,

First, it is worth checking if your SAP Build Process Automation Extension for both Edge and Chrome are active. If not, activate it and then try adding the tenant again. 

 

If this doesn't work. Try the below:

1. Uninstall or Remove the latest Agent Version.

2. Delete any existing credentials/authentication stored in the Windows Credential Manager.

Usually the credential has, IRPA/BPA on the credential name. (Delete all existing)

3. Delete/Disconnect existing Agent from your Build Lobby ->  Control Tower -> Agents.

4. Install the latest Desktop Agent. (Make sure the browser extension mentioned above is installed as well)

5. Add tenant and enter the necessary credentials. 

Hope it helps!

-weisson

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Controller Lifecycle Methods Explained!
entry.content: Thanks for the explanation.

entry.title: Local approuter gives cors error while using a deployed service
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to access the service of a CAP application from another CAP application both the applications are deployed. 

Current Environment is local, I have bounded the local approuter to the service which I need to use, when using directly via browser the API works. But when the UI application tries to call any API, it gives CORS issue.

Tried using extensions to disable/enable CORS but still no luck.

Directory structure for UI

xs-app.json for router

we have CORS middleware in service layer as well

When the manifest is being loaded gives cors

entry.title: Automated and Semi-automated Control Effectiveness test
entry.content:
Hi All,

The planner tasks for Test of Effectivness are not detecting the controls which are marked as 'Semi_automated' and 'Automated'  in their Test Automation. How can i select the controls for them to be tested as 'Automated/Semi-automated Test of Effectivness'.

note: Only when they are tagged as 0MAN in their Test Automation, they appear to be as selectable for Test of effectiveness

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Re: CDS views to create an Extern API in SAP Public cloud...

Thank you for your response. actually i have added some custom fields on the sales order header level and we are trying to use these in a BTP application we are creating an API from SAP public cloud with these sales order data but wanted to check when those particular fields were changes hence we are trying to capture the change log for those fields in the API and wanted to know how this can be achieved, if there is any CDS view that can be used in the custom CDS view to create an API or if there is any standard API that we can use to get the change log for the custom field sin sales order screen.

something similar to CDHDR and CDPOS tables in Public cloud would help my requirement.

entry.title: SOP in the SAP Public Cloud system

Thanks..

entry.title: Re: How to create additional 89 inspection lot during goo...
entry.content:
Hi Pablon,

The way to manually create inspection lots (with origin 89) is transaction QA01. There is no way to automate this (without any development) so you might consider to extend the inspection of the inspection lots triggered by origin 01.

An alternative could be to use origin 08 and limit all the movement types for this origin, except the 101 movement type. But this solution direction will limit your further usage of this origin.

greetings, Herman

entry.title: How to create custom form template based on custom bo in s4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to create new custom business object and custom form template based on that custom business object in s4hana cloud system.

And as I checked, key user extensibility cannot fulfill that requirement.

So, how can I create that kind of custom business object and custom form template easily.

If you have any documentation about it, could you please share with me?

Best Regards.

Your guidance on resolving this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks and regards,

Sravani

entry.title: Integration Suite ODATA APIs from Business Hub
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to create an integration flow, consuming some ODATA services (e.g. the Characteristic Data for Classification -  https://api.sap.com/api/API_CLFN_CHARACTERISTIC_SRV/overview).

I want to start with the sandbox to try out my integration flow. But how can I connect to the sandbox in the integration flow? When using ODATA v2 connection between Request Reply and Recipient, I'm not able to configure the authentication. I can only configure basic authentication with user and password, but to use the sandbox, an API key as authentication method is needed.

How is this meant to work? Or is it not wanted, to use the sandbox as a first (of course read only) test instance?

entry.title: Am not able to modify loginDisabled attribute for my b2bCustomer via impex.
entry.content:
I am attempting to modify the 'loginDisabled' attribute for customer records using the HAC impex import console and have also experimented with including it in the impex header for hotfolder implementations. While importing valid customer files via hotfolder successfully updates other attributes, the 'loginDisabled' attribute remains unchanged.

I am seeking guidance on how to successfully modify this specific attribute through impex, or if such modification is indeed feasible.

entry.title: S4 security roles in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using a generic id in the Tunnel Live connection to S/4. But the requirement now is to implement S4 roles in SAC, so that any user with a company code access should see only that company code data in SAC.

How we can implement this requirement.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: All about Gantt chart in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hey dear @JinheeJeong! Thanks for this helpful post.

 

I have a follow-up question regarding the hierarchy view in the Gantt chart.

From what I understand, the hierarchy follows this structure: 1. Phase → 2. Deliverable → 3. Task → 4. Subtask (as an example). Is there any hidden way to set or adjust the order of (sub)tasks? It seems there’s no sorting option, like in the list view, where you can sort by start or completion date, for instance.

I’ve already tried using a numeric naming convention (e.g., 1_, 2_, 3_...) for the (sub)task names, but that didn’t seem to work. I’d really appreciate your advice—or even a simple “No, it’s not possible” to give me some peace of mind. 🙂  Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Extending the Item Master Data Detail page via SAP B1...
entry.content:
Hi RBurgos,

In the link below, you can find the supported view for FP 2405.

Online Help

Currently, we do not support item master data. In the future, we will be adding additional views.

thanks

nofar

entry.title: Re: o1 coding in ABAP
entry.content: To answer your question from the initial post. We trained an LLM Model with our development guidelines, naming convention and some further information as an ABAP Assistant. It's in the moment not more, than an Assistant but it's already helpful in the daily tasks. Especially for the functional teammember, so they can together with the ABAP assistant do some development tasks already independently.

entry.title: Re: Consuming Data from Databricks to Datasphere
entry.content: Thank you for great blog, is it right way (with compliance acc: 3255746) to send data from SAP datasphere to 3rd party tools ( without Replication flow and premium outbound ) . Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: Security Test Rise
entry.content:
The scope of RISE is individual, making one precise answer covering all detailed aspects too broad. Therefore, it's advisable to have the total solution scope sorted and listed before continuing with the pentest. Architectural issues due to the broad variety of customer landscapes should optimally be avoided before initiating the pentest, therefore having a centralized Cybersecurity & Compliance perspective on your landscape is very advisable. Establishing clear requirements for deciding if to follow the white, grey or even black box test approach is essential as defining efforts and costs of the test execution.

Once all is cleared, one can check for typical vulnerabilities (patches, configuration, …), go through all system entry points or even through frameworks offered by various other vendors than SAP. RISE is in this context to be understood more as bundle of SAP products and services, whereas pentest cover the validation of security requirements per technological solution area being different wrt. of their type (SaaS, IaaS, ... ).

Please follow the SAP Customer Penetration Testing Request Process as described in note 3080379 for notifing the respective hosting organization.

entry.title: What new in Job Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM - 2.0
entry.content:
Introduction:

Blog number 35. #35

SAP Cloud ALM continues to evolve as an indispensable tool for managing and monitoring SAP landscapes. The latest updates to Job and Automation Monitoring bring significant enhancements, enabling organizations to efficiently manage automated processes, improve transparency, and streamline operations.

This blog explores these updates in depth, offering insights into how they can empower businesses to optimize their IT operations and adapt to evolving business needs.

I am a firm believer of the fact that Application Lifecycle Management can be a game changer and key player in digital transformation of an organization. Job Monitoring is one of the most important part of operations of any landscape.

Introduction to Job Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM

In SAP environments, managing scheduled jobs and background tasks across multiple systems can be challenging. SAP Cloud ALM's Job and Automation Monitoring simplifies this by providing a centralized view of all scheduled processes, alerts for failures or delays, and actionable insights to improve operational efficiency.

The recent updates build on this foundation with advanced features such as granular alerting, enhanced notifications, new job types for monitoring, and an intuitive user interface. Let’s dive into the details.

1. Additional Filters in Monitoring

You can now use more filters to further refine the jobs and automations displayed in the Monitoring page. These filters are available in Monitoring  -> Filter  -> Additional Filters.

The following filters are available in Additional Filters:
  • Step/Executable: Filter by the step/executable name of the job or automation.
  • Scheduled by: Filter by the user who has scheduled the job or automation.
  • Executed by: Filter by the user who has executed the job or automation.

 2. More options in Overview cards

You can now perform additional actions from the card in the Overview section, in the Home page.

Select  (more)to perform any of the following actions for that managed component:
  • Edit the configuration
  • Navigate to the monitoring details
  • Navigate to the alerting details

 

 

Conclusion:

These two new features will add more depth to job monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM. More filters means it will add another level of reporting and now reporting can be done based on the new filters and it will be easier to find and search a particular job in SAP Cloud ALM.

With addition to new features to the overview page, now Job Monitoring will have more strength to the fact that Job Monitoring can act as the single source of truth for Job Monitoring in Application Lifecycle Management for any managed system.

Keep learning and keep sharing !

entry.title: Re: Step into the Future of Integration: Using Azure CosmosDB Receiver Adapter in SAP Integration Su
entry.content: Well explained Piotr!

entry.title: Re: S4 security roles in SAC
entry.content:
Hi @jain06 ,

You need to create teams, users and roles as per Company code requirement in Security.

Below is sample teams 

After create teams you need to assign this user to as per company code and teams

 

1.In model level you need to activate Data access control for Company code diamension.

 

2. After that 2 new column will add in your company code diamension like below Read and Write

3. After that as per your company code you have to assign teams in front of your company code.

You can give access as per your requirement for user or teams.

Thank You.

entry.title: How to update Inventory Counting UoM Code by DTW
Re: Single Sign-on: SAP Reference Architecture for Identity Access Management
entry.content:
Hi @tskwin,

Personally I'd go with having both SAC instances bound to the productive IAS tenant, as the identity authentication typically does not change there.

IAS test would in this case be there for developing / modifying / testing the centralized authentication services, but not for handling authentication requests of (DEV, TST & PRD) applications across your landscape.

Best regards

entry.title: Random P-User selected during login to Community 2024 (I can't choose)
entry.content:
Hello,

This is an email I have just sent to sso@sap.com and community@sap.com. I post it in Community 2024 in case other people have the same issue.

When I log in to Notification feed - SAP Community every morning under my SAP Universal ID (primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com), there’s no popup asking me under which account I want to login, it defaults to a linked P-User that I hadn’t use for days or months, it doesn’t select the last user I have used (S-User).

If I then go to Services & Support - SAP for Me, of course there’s an issue because the current account is a P-User instead of a S-User, so I have to log out and log in to Services & Support - SAP for Me, there’s a popup from which I can select my S-User.

If I log out, restart Edge, log in to Notification feed - SAP Community again, my P-User is selected again by default, instead of selecting the last used account (the S-user).

For information, the popup is also shown if I log in to SAP Developer Center | Official Resources for SAP Developers.

Is it possible to either select by default the last used account or let the user choose any of the linked accounts?

Workaround: I could unlink all my P-Users from my SAP Universal ID/secondary email address xxxxxxxxxxx@mycompany.com, but it’s the worst solution of course.

Steps to reproduce:

  1. Start Edge
  2. Start inPrivate window
  3. Login to https://community.sap.com/t5/notificationfeed/page
  4. Use of my SAP Universal ID primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com.
    Click Next.
  5. Type the password.
    Click Sign in.

  6.  

    PROBLEM: I cannot select which linked account I want to use; the Community page is shown, which means that one account was automatically selected (I don’t know which one).
  7. Login to https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/knowledge.
    PROBLEM: weird message “Due to inactivity…” Click “click here”.
  8. PROBLEM: click the user settings, you can see that a random P-User account was selected by the Community login.
  9. For information, here are my linked accounts (SAP Universal ID Account Manager😞

For comparison, I don’t have any issue if I first login via Services & Support - SAP for Me, I can select my account:

  1. Start Edge
  2. Start inPrivate window
  3. Login to https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/knowledge.
  4. Use of my SAP Universal ID primary email address: xxxxxxxxxxx@gmail.com.
    Click Next.
  5. Type the password.
    Click Sign in.
  6. GOOD, I can select the account I want:

  7. For information, if I now go to https://community.sap.com/t5/notificationfeed/page, it considers the current login correctly:

entry.title: Re: S4 security roles in SAC
entry.content: Hi Yogeshwar, Thanks for your reply. The above steps are for import connection, we are using live connection.

entry.title: Re: DMC – Bill Of Material – Few interesting Highlights
entry.content:
I also have a question like how to use formula in BOM for dynamic quantity calculation. It is clear upto creating a data type for formula and assigning it. But I need Assembly Qty=Assembly Qty + User defined variable on POD screen. He enters the quantity and based on that ass quantity automatically calculated. 

Have you figured out how to make formula parameter display on the POD screen?

Please let me know.

entry.title: Re: S4 security roles in SAC
entry.content:
@jain06 

S4 live connection will only respect S4 security roles if the id is not generic as the roles defined in S4 are on individual user id and not generic id.

Nikhil

entry.title: Is there a way to eliminate the differences in standard costs when transferred between plants in sap
entry.content:
Is there a way to eliminate the differences in standard costs when transferred between plants in sap? (Not between companies)

(Example)
Plant A manages standard cost of 100 yen, and item plant B manages standard cost of 120 yen. 20 yen difference occurs when transferring items between plants (inventory account 20 / difference account 20).

Since this difference is internal profit, it must be eliminated and returned in the quarter (12/31, inventory account 20/difference account 20, 1/1, inventory account 20/difference account 20).

→If we try to do this in MR21, we need to do it on the same day.

entry.title: Migration Checklist: SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite, Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

There is a lot of information available already regarding the move from SAP PO to CPI, please find a collection of links in our blog Integration Excellence: https://www.integration-excellence.com/migration-checklist-sap-po-to-sap-integration-suite/

The following areas are covered:

  • Preparing Questions
  • SAP Backend (ABAP) Integration 
  • Interface Design
  • Security
  • Operations

Please leave a comment if I might have missed major aspects!

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Automatic Rejection Emails 48 Hours...
entry.content:
Hi Laura,

as far as I know there is no way to set it up to take into account holidays and weekends etc. 

We have opted to send the notification out 7 days after the status change, this way we can at least make sure it is a regular working day (not a sunday), but our recruiters still need to be aware of the local holidays.

Kr,

Feline

entry.title: Is it possible to do a gross average of materials in SAP with transaction code CKMLCP?
entry.content:
Is it possible to do a gross average of materials in SAP with transaction code CKMLCP?

I believe that CKMLCP is a transaction that can evaluate the total average of products, but I would like to know if it is possible to evaluate the total average of materials including purchase price differences, etc.

entry.title: Re: Fiori App My Time Events Version F1506A -
entry.content: SAP Note 2841163?

entry.title: Re: DMC – Bill Of Material – Few interesting Highlights
entry.content:
Hi @SRVenkattSrinivas 

The Formula use in SAP DM depends on the simplicity of the integration with other elements related to quantity calculated. 

You can refer to the link https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-formula?locale=en-US for a component use and to https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-formula-for-bom-header-material?locale=en-US for header use.

If the description doesn't fit your require, you can also create a specific POD to help you with it.

I hope you find your answers.
Regards,
Badreddine

entry.title: SAP B1 profit & loss statement has recorded a cost transaction twice. Can someone let me know why?
entry.content:
When I run the general ledger report for the nominal ledger code and view the transactions in the "Account Balance" I can only see one entry (this specific example is for a £17.56 bank charge debited to the Bank Charges account code). However when I run the p/l the total value is exactly £17.56 extra so it looks like SAP has added an extra £17.56 but I don't know why

NB - there are no "BN" entries

Account Balance view:

Profit and loss statement showing £96.32 charge for the period rather than £78.76:

entry.title: Re: SAP BYD OutboundDelivery by OData API missing Notes

Albrecht

entry.title: Re: About CA10
entry.content: table T435T is the correct answer to the question of OP.

entry.title: Re: Update EC data after onboarding but before start date
entry.content: Update: We have had to switch on the edit functionality (following the KBA above) to allow Super Admins to edit the employee data before start date however this is a temporary workaround. Switching it on for Employee Services, means switchng it on for ONB admins too which we dont want to do as they are roles carried out by different team members. If anyone has any info on how they manage this better please assist! Thankyou

entry.title: Product value help not showing any product list for a sales order
entry.content:
While creating a new sales order, the product list is not showing.  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Product value help not showing any product list for a...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The product list is determined by the Sales Organization and Distribution Channel. However, if the distribution channel differs between the sales order and product master data, the system will not display the product in the list. The products will only be displayed when the Sales Organization and Distribution Channel match between the sales order and product.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: dropping fields in postgres db
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I am building a project using SAP CAP and database is postgres. I am getting error 'Dropping fields is not allowed' when i  am trying to remove a field from the table. Is there any to force delete using cds deploy ?

I have tried to delete the column using SQL ( column gets deleted) but still deploy error, Probably it is storing the info in csn.

Error: CDS compilation failed (@sap/cds-compiler v5.6.0)
db/schema.cds:10:8: Error: Dropping elements is not supported (in entity:“com.cades.Invoices”/element:“AccessKey1”)
at throwWithAnyError (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds-compiler/lib/base/messages.js:585:13)
at Proxy.toSqlDdl (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds-compiler/lib/render/toSql.js:283:3)
at sqlMigration (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds-compiler/lib/api/main.js:594:13)
at Function.api [as migration] (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds-compiler/lib/api/main.js:1154:22)
at Function.migration (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds-compiler/lib/main.js:144:41)
at Object.deltaSql (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/compile/cdsc.js:162:53)
at Function.cds_compile_to_deltaSql [as delta] (/home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/compile/to/sql.js:38:59)

at async /home/syed-imran/myfolder/monitor-ts/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/dbs/cds-deploy.js:39:19

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere Combined to the rescue.... (Drill Down in SAP Analytics
entry.content: @Sebastian_Gesiarz , the "Navi API" is an option, but please note that it was only migrated to the the ODE Story because of the compatibility with the app mode. Our Prod. Management/Dev colleagues do NOT plan to enhance it anymore. Of course it will not get shut down any time soon (not so easy to predict how much time it will be available though), but no enhancements are planned there. In other words, if you have other options to solve the use case, please do it without this specific API.

entry.title: ABAP CDS data model design
entry.content:
Hi All

I am looking for some guidance on how to redesign a complex custom ABAP CDS data model which has been developed inefficiently and which is causing a lot of performance issues. The main ABAP CDS entity has a lot of joins and it takes a huge amount of HANA database time to execute the query. I am looking for some guidance to see how best to break down the one large CDS entity with multiple joins to multiple smaller CDS entities? 

Thanks Amit

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud & SAP Datasphere Combined to the rescue.... (Drill Down in SAP Analytics
entry.content: ...otherwise looking forward for the part 2! + Happy new year!!!!!

entry.title: Re: Tcode for Equipment BOM list
entry.content: Pete as always is always right. that's the best way to do it

entry.title: Re: Maximum Limit on Rebate | Settlement Management | Con...
entry.content:
Hi @priya_sshekhar, 

You should try with C "best condition between the 2 exclusions group". 
Best means that it will deactivate the HIGHEST amount between the 2 groups of conditions exclusion. 
Least favorable means it will deactivate the LOWEST amount between the 2 groups of conditions exclusion. 

Regards. 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Call SAP Digital Manufacturing Production Processes via REST API
entry.content:
Introduction

Production Processes (PPDS) within SAP Digital Manufacturing can be initiated out of the box in many different ways, including automatic triggers and POD action buttons, for example. Calling production processes from the external world via API, including from 3rd party solutions, is also a common implementation requirement.

In this blog post, I will show you how to call Production Processes via the 'Process Engine' API registered in SAP Digital Manufacturing´s Service Registry.

Implementation Steps

First, you need to Create a Service Instance and Service Key in SAP Digital Manufacturing Subaccount and get public-api-endpoint, clientid, clientsecret and url values.

Then, create, save and deploy your production process, but make sure you click "..." > 'Edit Header' in the top right corner of the PPD and switch ON 'Publish to Service Registry' option.

Then, go to Manage Service Registry app, filter, find, select your production process and get 'URL / Path' value.

Now, you can call your production processes from the external world via REST, using <url>+'/oauth/token', 'clientid' and 'clientsecret' values from the Service Key for OAUTH 2.0 client credential authentication, and 'public-api-endpoint' from the Service Key + 'URL / Path' from Manage Service Registry app as URL. See a Postman example below:

* For 'Access Token URL', use the 'url' field from service key and add '/oauth/token' to the end. A typical access token service URL, for example, should look like: https://{$Subdomain}.authentication.xxxx.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token

Which runs successfully and returns  "processInstanceName": "TriggerAlert#2537", which can be also seen in SAP Digital Manufacturing at Monitor Production Processes app.

You can map production process input parameters using JSON, example:

Which can be seen in Monitor Production Processes as well:

Conclusion

Using the 'Process Engine' API registered in service registry, you can trigger SAP Digital Manufacturing Production Processes from the external world via REST API.

The scenario described in this blog post is as simple as possible for educational purposes, but can be further extended and leveraged in more complex scenarios easily.

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: #ABAP_Trial Docker image fails to start HDB
entry.content: problem solved - in the .wslconfig file I needed to add more memory  memory=20GB

entry.title: Clear Facts & Classic Story BUG
entry.content:
Hi team, i may have found an bug.
I am using SAP Analytics Cloud, and i am creating an model and a Story.
When i saw i had the wrong data on the model, i cleared the data that i had there, and then imported an new excel in there, but when i got to the story the old data was still there, so i tried to clear data again, and check if the story was empty with data, but it wasnt, it still had all the information from the old excel.

Does anyone recognize this problem?

Best Regards, Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Re: Information regarding the ECC6.0 EHP 0
entry.content:
Direct link to ECC6 EHP0: 

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam?hash=s%3DSAP%2520ECC%25206.0%26o%3Dmost_viewed%257Cdesc%26st%3Dl%26rpp%3D20%26page%3D1%26pvnr%3D01200615320900001261%26pt%3Dt%257CPLTFRM%26ainstnr%3D01200615324900003274%26fclfilter%3DG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520X86_64%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520X86%252032-BIT%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520POWER%2520BIG%2520ENDIAN%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520IA64%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520FOR%2520ZSERIES

For SUSE, only SUSE 10 and 11 are supported.

entry.title: Re: Building a business data fabric: SAP Datasphere vs. DIY implementations
entry.content: Thank you for very nice blog, but what is performance and cost when compared datasphere to 3rd party tools like Snowflake, MS Fabric DW, .. ?

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applic
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event will be about Combining the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applications.

Join us for this day event of developer networking and hands-on learning at the Zalando Offices in Berlin, Germany.

In this CodeJam we will learn how to use an instance of SAP HANA Cloud, develop a multi-target application using SAP Business Application Studio and SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and create a service layer and SAP Fiori UI that also includes SAP HANA native artifacts, such as calculation views.

You can make yourself familiar with the prerequisites and the learning content through the CodeJam content repository on GitHub - https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Friday, January 17th 2025, in Berlin, Germany at the Zalando offices.

The instructors for this event are the Developer Advocates @KevinR and @Vitaliy-R .

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

entry.title: After submitting the change request,when i am checking in workflowlog my workitem id is blank
Re: SAP B1 profit & loss statement has recorded a cost tr...
entry.content:
Hi,

This cannot be determined with ease what has happened.

A few things may be you can check is by running the detect query in SAP Note 1448514. Another thing which can be checked is by running the following query on the SQL/HANA studio:

Select * from JDT1 where "Account" ="ShortName" and "Account" = '607901' and "Debit" = 17.56;

Select * from JDT1 where "Account" ="ShortName" and "Account" = '607901' and "Credit" = 17.56;

Check if more than one entry, then is there a different in some field value in both or not.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to use virtual elements into a child CDS View?
entry.content: Hi junwu,

entry.title: Re: How to use virtual elements into a child CDS View?
entry.content: Thanks junwu, you're right! I declared it this way and now it works. However, one thing, I needed to move the root entity declaration to the projection view. Before, I didn't get any errors, but the class/method weren't called.

entry.title: Re: How to create inbound api endpoint for SAP DMC
entry.content: Hi, in you second comment you provide an update that it should work. I've found your tutorial and got it to work. the magic for me was that when you publish a PPD to the service registry it automatically creates an API endpoint for you. This was unclear before. Now I can go to the service registry, find the service (it is named the same as my PPD) and use that path.

entry.title: Re: SAP Tech Bytes: Using the SAP Approuter at dev time - a full-stack journey with UI5 and SAP CAP
entry.content:
Hi @nicoschoenteich 

I did whatever you wrote but when i try to start app router with npm run dev it's couldnt work as a hybrid mode. But when i tried to just run cap-server it works fine with xsuaa and hana. Example output like this: (on windows)

[cds] - connect to db > sqlite { database: ':memory:' }
/> successfully deployed to in-memory database.

[cds] - using auth strategy {
kind: 'mocked',
impl: '..\\..\\node_modules\\@sap\\cds\\lib\\srv\\middlewares\\auth\\basic-auth'
}

entry.title: SAP Build App deployment
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I completed deploying an app in SAP Build. I got a link to the app as shown in the screenshot. 

 

However, I'm not able to find the app in Cloud Foundry - Spaces to start it. 

I'm not sure if the steps I followed are correct or no. I did the publish your app in App Editor


Then I used SAP Build Work Zone to deploy the App. As I understood in order to access the link I need to start it from Cloud Foundry. However, as I said, I'm not finding the app there. 

Can someone tell me in steps what is the right way to publish the app? 

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Consume CDS CAP oData Service by Workzone UI Integration Card
entry.content: Hi ckuczera

entry.title: Re: Deletion only possible if status is initial Message no. NR621
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: HTTP calls to SAP Cloud Integration from API Management getting rejected - HTTP 500
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to expose a SAP CI api via SAP API management. SAP CI Iflow has a Http Sender Adapter that accepts the payload and pushes it to a JMS Queue.

Inbound requests from postman towards the SAP CI HTTP url using the client id client secret are successful and give a 202 as expected.

When the same API is exposed via API Management it throws a Http 500 , a message log is not created in SAP CI message monitor and there is just a standard response like below.

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <title>HTTP Status 500 – Internal Server Error</title>
    <style type="text/css">
        body {
            font-family: Tahoma, Arial, sans-serif;
        }
When i tried to check the logs in SAP CI , I could see that the requests are hitting SAP CI but are getting rejected due to reasons I don't fully understand. 

 

 

SAP API Management has SAP CI as a API Provider - Internet, It's not of type Cloud Integration as I didnt have a working username password and using my suser always throws up a 401 in Test Connection.
Here is my API provider Config - URL is SAP CI Runtime url and not the tenant management url

This is how my debug trace looks. nothing complex here , just getting username password from key value map and then using Basic auth step to place it in the header.

 


  

It's not giving 401 but somehow SAP CI doesnt like the request
Can you please help me understand what the error in the trace means.

Regards

Vinay
#integrationsuite #sapci #sapapimanagement #apimanagement #api #cloudintegration

entry.title: Fiscal Year Change in co.code 8810 possible only after year-end closing 2023
entry.content:
Hi，

I want know how to fix this issue? I read the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3288608/E.  But I did not get the mean, Is that mean I need to change "Lowest closed fiscal year in CC" to "2023" manually? and change the status to "productive" manually in app "Make Company Code Settings" ? 

Is it not automatic changed after finance finished annual closing and opening?

entry.title: SAP Group reporting : copying an FS Item Value to another at datamonitor level
entry.content:
Hello, 

I need to copy a data registered on FS ITEM to another FS Item : this data can be entered manually or imported by Integration suite.  All I want to do is to affect  A to XA ==>  XA = A with its analysis. Is there a way to do it in the substitution rule or a rule that can be executed in Data Monitor ?  

Thank you very much

entry.title: Queries related to migrate SAP JAM to SF WorkZone
entry.content:
1. Do the client need to buy separate License for migrating from SAP JAM to SF WorkZone?

2. In the content migration, can we migrate the Applications (SAP & Non-SAP) or just the SAP Application contents will be migrated?

3. Will the Tasks and To do list created in SAP JAM be migrated to SF Workzone?

entry.title: Re: SAP PS conversion project.
entry.content: Hi, ok, then without knowing which kind of organization or Company you are working with some thoughts. Because you are doing conversion, I assume that PS-module have been used already, some cases even decades... Most probably there are customizations e.g. specific Z-reports. Have you already done fit-gap analyses (ECC/PS vs S/4HANA EPPM/CPM/PM)? What actually would be needed? Are standard (existing) features enough? Depending e.g. how much new CloudAPAB will be needed, impacts costs and time, also migrations, tests, change management, etc., etc.

entry.title: SAP Build: ABAP Cloud Full-Stack, no system selectable
entry.content:
Hi, I want to launch a new ABAP Cloud Full-Stack application but when getting to the section to select a system I have nothing to choose from:

When I choose the "the prerequisites", its leading to "We couldn't find that page."

How to continue here? I have a running ABAP cloud stack where I can connect to with ADT.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tools VSCode extension activates in more than 150 secondes 😲

entry.title: Re: How to Track Payment Term Changes in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Did you try :

  • In the SAP menu: Customer Periodic  Processing  Information system  Report Selection  Master Data  Display Changes Customers
  • In Fiori did you look for applications such as Change History for Revenue Accountant

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS data model design
entry.content: It's very simple: ask the HANA database administrator to identify the reason of the performance issue, then adapt your join as per the administrator recommendations.
